skill_loop.repeat_policy: serial pass, one lever per commit

target.scenario: 1000-equation linear Add chain with final output marked used

baseline_fingerprint.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-interpreters-profile-pass24 cargo bench -p fj-interpreters --bench pe_baseline -- --sample-size 40 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1

profile_hotspots.evidence: Criterion rch baseline ranked dce/all_used/1000eq as the slowest fj-interpreters pe_baseline case

opportunity_matrix.lever: For large DCE graphs, record retained equation positions during the reverse liveness pass and clone retained equations in forward order, with a full-retention fast path.

change.summary: dce_jaxpr keeps the existing reverse-push path for graphs below 256 equations, and uses a retained-position mask plus forward-order cloning for larger graphs

after.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-interpreters-profile-pass24-gated cargo bench -p fj-interpreters --bench pe_baseline -- --sample-size 40 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1

benchmark_delta.noise_note: dce/all_used/10eq and dce/all_used/100eq are on the unchanged path below the 256-equation threshold; their slower rebench values moved with other unrelated rows, so they are treated as run-wide noise rather than a semantic or local-path regression.

isomorphism_proof.ordering_preserved: yes - below 256 equations the old reverse-push-then-reverse path is retained exactly; at 256+ equations retained positions are recorded by original equation index and cloned in original forward order
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking_unchanged: yes - DCE only filters equations by liveness; no comparator, map iteration, or tie-breaking policy changed
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: N/A - DCE graph pruning does not evaluate floating-point operations or rewrite equation payloads
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A - no RNG state, seeding, or random primitive path is touched

validation.result: nonzero due pre-existing fj-interpreters monolith inventory; findings include test unwrap/assert/index inventories and an Instant::now false-positive, none in the DCE hunk

validation.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-interpreters-proof-pass24b cargo test -p fj-interpreters dce --lib -- --nocapture
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-interpreters-proof-pass24-full cargo test -p fj-interpreters --lib -- --nocapture
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-interpreters-check-pass24 cargo check -p fj-interpreters --all-targets
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-interpreters-clippy-pass24 cargo clippy -p fj-interpreters --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings

decision.reason: Profile-backed top fj-interpreters DCE benchmark improved by 18.66 percent on the same RCH worker with unchanged DCE golden digest and focused crate-scoped validation.
